title: ChangePassport Evidence Event
description: Event emitted by an evidence provider for ingestion into sdp-pr-gate. Ingestion is idempotent. Dedup key: source + external_ref + commit_sha. 12 required fields match the manifesto core contract; artifact_uri, artifact_hash, and error_state are optional extensions.

schema_version.description: Schema version of this evidence event. Must be '1' for v1.

source.description: Unique identifier of the evidence provider. Reverse-DNS format recommended (e.g. 'github-actions', 'snyk.sast', 'sonarqube'). Forms part of the dedup key with external_ref and commit_sha.

external_ref.description: External reference ID for this evidence event. Must be unique within the source provider's namespace. Examples: CI run ID, scanner finding ID, review comment ID. Forms part of the dedup key with source and commit_sha.

repository.description: Repository identity for the change under evaluation.

commit_sha.description: Full 40-character hex SHA of the commit this evidence was observed on. Forms part of the dedup key with source and external_ref.

observed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the evidence was originally observed by the provider (not when it was collected or submitted).

collected_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the evidence was collected/submitted to the API. Must be >= observed_at.

actor.description: The entity that produced or triggered this evidence.

status.description: Outcome status of this evidence. 'degraded' indicates partial or low-confidence data.

summary.description: Human-readable summary of the evidence event. Should be self-contained enough to display in a passport without additional context.

artifact_uri.description: URI to the artifact produced by this event. Omit or use null when no artifact exists.

artifact_hash.description: Cryptographic hash of the artifact for integrity verification. Null if artifact_uri is empty.

error_state.description: Error details if the evidence collection encountered problems. Null if no error.

id.description: Canonical repository identifier. Platform-specific format (e.g., 'acme/my-app' for GitHub, 'project/repo' for Gerrit).

url.description: Canonical web URL of the repository.

provider.description: Platform identifier for the repository host (e.g., 'github', 'gitlab', 'gerrit', 'bitbucket').

branch.description: Target branch for the pull request (base branch).

id.description: Pull request identifier. Numeric ID or platform-specific format.

url.description: Canonical web URL of the pull request.

title.description: Title of the pull request at the time of evidence collection.

id.description: Unique identifier for the actor within the source system.

name.description: Human-readable display name for the actor.

artifact_hash.description: Cryptographic hash of the evidence artifact. Supports multiple algorithms; SHA-256 is required for v1.

algorithm.description: Hash algorithm used. SHA-256 is the default and required algorithm for v1.

value.description: Hex-encoded hash digest. Length depends on algorithm: 64 chars for SHA-256/BLAKE2b-256, 96 for SHA-384, 128 for SHA-512/BLAKE2b-512.

error_state.description: Error details if evidence collection encountered problems. Null means no error.

code.description: Machine-readable error code. Dot-separated hierarchical format recommended.

message.description: Human-readable error message describing what went wrong.

retry_possible.description: Whether retrying the evidence collection may succeed. Providers should set true for transient failures.
